originalTitle: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
content: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

originalTitle: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
title: Good News! Brave Helpers Bring Peace Back to a Nigerian Village!
content:
Hello, my wonderful friends all across Africa! It’s your friendly news reporter here, ready to share a very important story with you. We want to talk about our big, beautiful continent and make sure everyone knows that we care about peace and happiness for all our brothers and sisters. Today, we have some news from a place called Nigeria. Nigeria is a very big country in Africa, with many amazing people, just like you! It has busy cities and quiet villages, beautiful nature, and lots of different languages and cultures. It's a land of sunshine and smiles, where many children love to play football and go to school every day.

A Quiet Village Called Hope Village

Imagine a little village in Nigeria. Let's call it Hope Village, because we always have hope! In Hope Village, children laugh as they play games like 'catch the ball' or 'hide and seek' under the big African sky. Mums and Dads work hard in their farms, growing yummy foods like maize and yams. Grandparents tell exciting stories, and everyone helps each other. It’s a place where everyone knows each other and feels safe and happy. Did you know? Nigeria is the most populated country in Africa! That means lots and lots of people live there, like a giant, happy family!

When Trouble Came to Hope Village

One day, some grown-ups, who were not very kind, came to Hope Village. They were troublemakers, and they made some people in the village feel very scared. They stayed for a little while, and this made it difficult for the children to go to school and for the grown-ups to work in their farms. It was a worrying time for everyone in Hope Village. These troublemakers are sometimes called 'bad guys' because they don't follow the rules of being kind and peaceful. They make things difficult for good people.

Brave Soldiers to the Rescue!

But guess what? We have many brave heroes in our world! In Nigeria, there are special people called soldiers. Their job is to protect everyone and make sure that peace returns. When they heard about the trouble in Hope Village, they quickly jumped into action. These soldiers are like superheroes without capes! They are strong and clever. They worked very hard to make sure the troublemakers left Hope Village. They showed the bad guys that they couldn't stay and scare people. Our soldiers are very important because they help keep our homes and villages safe. Did you know? Soldiers often train for a very long time to be strong and smart, so they can protect their country and its people.

Help From Above and All Around

Not just soldiers on the ground, but also special planes in the sky helped! These planes are like big birds that help the soldiers see what's happening from far above. Together, the soldiers on the ground and the helpers in the sky worked as a team to make sure the troublemakers left Hope Village and peace could return. After a couple of days, the troublemakers were gone! The brave soldiers made sure it was safe for everyone again. This was such good news for Hope Village!

Getting Back to Normal

Now that the bad guys are gone, the people in Hope Village can start to feel safe again. It's like when a big storm passes, and the sun comes out again! Some people might have felt hurt or very sad, but now they are getting lots of help. People from other villages and towns are sending food, water, and clothes to Hope Village. They are helping to fix homes that might have been broken. Everyone is working together, like a big family, to make sure Hope Village is strong and happy again. Did you know? When people help each other after something difficult, it's called community spirit, and it makes everyone feel stronger and happier!

Why This Story Matters to All of Us

This story is important because it shows us a few things. First, it reminds us that even when bad things happen, there are always good people ready to help. Our soldiers are brave, and many kind people care about their neighbours. Second, it reminds us that peace is very, very important. When we have peace, children can go to school, families can be together, and everyone can feel safe to play and grow. We want every child in Africa to live in peace and joy.

A Message of Hope and Kindness

So, my dear friends, when you hear stories like this, remember to be kind to each other. Help your friends, listen to your parents and teachers, and always try to spread happiness. Every small act of kindness helps to build a more peaceful and loving Africa. Let's all keep hope in our hearts for Hope Village and for every village and city in our amazing continent. We are stronger together! Keep smiling, and I’ll be back with more news soon! Bye for now!
summary: Brave soldiers and helpers brought peace back to a Nigerian village after troublemakers caused fear, ensuring children can play and families can be safe again.
whyMatters: This story matters because it shows us that even when bad things happen, good people like soldiers and kind neighbours will always help to bring peace and safety back to our communities, so children can grow up happy.
